caption: The video showcases a close-up view of a modern coffee machine's control panel, focusing on three buttons with distinct icons. The first button on the left features an icon of a single cup, likely for brewing a single serving of coffee. The middle button displays two cups, indicating it is used for brewing a double serving. The third button on the right has an icon resembling a carafe or pitcher, possibly for making a larger batch of coffee. The camera remains steady, capturing the sleek design and metallic finish of the control panel, which reflects light subtly, emphasizing its clean and contemporary aesthetic. The background is a solid teal color, providing a striking contrast to the silver and black tones of the machine.
